Cleaned up the authenticated request flow.

What changed:
- Removed the persisted `wizardOpen` flag and all redirect logic tied to it.
- â€śNieuwe aanvraagâ€ť now only routes to `/requests/create`.
- `/requests/create` now uses `backendKind="memory"`, so opening the create route no longer writes an empty wizard session to localStorage.
- When intent is saved, `onRequestCreated` stores the created draft in the authenticated request list and routes to `/requests/:id/edit`.
- The edit route still loads the draft at the details step and uses the request-specific persisted wizard session from there.

Verified with `bun run --cwd apps/frontend-pt1-extranet-onboarding build`. Build passes with the existing Vite chunk-size warning.

Yes, the coming-soon pages are using `packages/ui/src/components/ui/empty.tsx`.

The path is:

- `AppPlaceholderPage.tsx` imports `Empty`, `EmptyIcon`, `EmptyTitle`, `EmptyDescription` from `@procertus-ui/ui`

The layout may feel different because `AppPlaceholderPage` adds wrapper classes on top of the base component:
